wifi.title: High-Speed Wi-Fi
wifi.description: Free stable internet connection in all rooms and the garden oasis.

location.title: In the Very Heart
location.description: Located on Dalmatinska street, just a few steps from Sarajevo's main pedestrian zone.

garden.title: Green Garden Lounge
garden.description: Our famous inner courtyard — the perfect place to relax, drink coffee, and meet people.

lockers.title: Secure Storage
lockers.description: Personal lockers for your peace of mind and free luggage storage anytime.

flexibleAccess.title: No Curfew
flexibleAccess.description: Smart lock codes grant you secure access to the building 24/7.

laundry.title: Laundry Service
laundry.description: Self-service washing and drying machines available on-site.

rooms.title: Choose your stay
rooms.subtitle: Select between social single bed dorms or comfortable private rooms
rooms.upgradeNoticeHint: Upgrade instructions will be provided after booking completion

singleBedDorm.title: Single Bed in Shared Dorm
singleBedDorm.description: Perfect for solo travelers and backpackers. Features comfortable mattresses, personal lockers, and individual power sockets next to your bed.

privateRoom.title: Private Room
privateRoom.description: Ideal for couples or digital nomads seeking privacy. Includes a spacious queen-size bed, private bathroom, and air conditioning.

timing.luggageAlert: Можно приехать раньше {time} или оставить вещи после выезда. Багаж бесплатно хранится на ресепшене!

payment.taxNote: Дополнительно оплачивается туристический сбор: {cost} KM (марки) за ночь.

quietHours.content: С 23:00 до 08:00 в хостеле действует режим тишины. Если вы возвращаетесь в это время, строго запрещено звонить в дверной звонок. Используйте коды доступа из приложения.

registration.content: Мы автоматически регистрируем всех гостей в местной миграционной службе (Белый картон). Вам ничего делать не нужно.

smoking.content: Курение внутри здания строго запрещено. Разрешено только снаружи — во внутреннем саду или на улице.

alcohol.content: Приносить свой алкоголь с улицы запрещено. Вы можете приобрести напитки в баре нашего хостела.

laundry.content: Услуга стирки и сушки одежды платная — 10 EUR. Обратитесь к администратору.

bus.clarificationQuestion: Which direction or country did you arrive from?
bus.centralHint: EU routes, Croatia, Federation of BiH

taxiService.title: Official Taxi (Zuti Taxi)
taxiService.noAppsInfo: There is no Uber, Bolt, or Yandex in Sarajevo. Taxi can only be ordered via WhatsApp message or a regular phone call.
taxiService.standWarning: Take a taxi only from the official stands on the street. Never agree to fixed high prices offered by drivers waiting right by the bus platforms.
taxiService.meterWarning: Make sure the driver clears the meter and starts it at the official base rate (2.50 KM).
taxiService.costTemplate: The fair price from {location} to the hostel is around {minKM}–{maxKM} KM ({minEUR}–{maxEUR} €).

public.title: Троллейбус №103
public.summary: Самый дешёвый вариант — троллейбус 103 до Čobanija, затем короткая прогулка до Dalmatinska 6.
public.text: Take trolleybus №103 directly to the city center. Tickets cost 1.80 KM at the kiosk or 2.00 KM from the driver (cash only). Remember to validate your ticket inside!
public.walkToStop: Walk about 14 minutes (1 km) out of the airport terminal to the 'Dobrinja škola' trolleybus stop.
public.walkToHostel: Cross the bridge over the river, turn left onto Main Street, and walk towards Dalmatinska 6.

taxi.costEstimation: The fair price from the airport to the hostel is around {minKM}–{maxKM} KM ({minEUR}–{maxEUR} €).

public.title: Троллейбус №103
public.summary: Прямой маршрут через границу сущностей до Čobanija, затем пешком до хостела.
public.text: Take trolleybus №103 towards 'Trg Austrije'. Tickets are 1.80 KM in the kiosk or 2.00 KM from the driver in cash. Please validate it immediately.
public.walkToStop: Walk about 7 minutes (500 m) from the East Sarajevo station building to the 'Dobrinja' terminal trolleybus stop.
public.walkToHostel: Cross the bridge over the Miljacka river and walk straight towards Dalmatinska street.

taxi.costEstimation: A convenient way to cross the entity border directly to the hostel door. Average cost is around 15 KM.

public.title: Трамвай №1
public.summary: Самый быстрый вариант — трамвай 1 до остановки Pošta, хостел за углом.
public.text: Take Tram №1 directly to the hostel area. Tickets are 1.80 KM at the kiosk or 2.00 KM from the driver (cash only).
public.walkToStop: Exit the bus station and walk 1 minute (78 m) forward to the 'Željezniчка stanica' tram loop right on the square.
public.getOffAt: Get off at 'Pošta' stop. You will see a massive Post Office building.
public.walkToHostel: Walk up towards Dalmatinska 6 — we are right around the corner.

taxi.costEstimation: A short ride to the hostel. The price should not exceed 7–10 KM.

public.title: Трамвай №1
public.summary: Прямой трамвай с площади до Pošta, ~3 мин пешком до входа.
public.text: Take Tram №1 towards 'Baščaršija'. Tickets cost 1.80 KM at the kiosk or 2.00 KM from the driver in cash.
public.walkToStop: Exit the railway station building. The tram loop is right in front of you on the main square (1 min walk).

taxi.costEstimation: The hostel is close, so the fair ride price on the taximeter is around 7–10 KM.

nightWarning.title: Важная информация
nightWarning.description: Вы заселились самостоятельно. Пожалуйста, утром с 08:00 подойдите на ресепшен, чтобы оплатить проживание и предоставить паспорт для обязательной туристической регистрации.

videoTour.title: Видео-инструкция (Рум-тур)
videoTour.description: Короткое видео: как найти комнату, где взять постельное белье и правила тишины.

guide.title: Локальный гид от хостела
guide.subtitle: Собрали для вас проверенные места в Сараево, чтобы вы не переплачивали как турист.

survivalKit.title: First Night Survival Kit
survivalKit.subtitle: Tired from the road? Here is what you need right now near the hostel.
survivalKit.teaserDescription: We hid bars, coffee shops, and viewpoints for tonight so you can get some rest. But if you're full of energy, you can unlock the full city guide right now.
survivalKit.showAllButton: I am not tired, show everything

mapCard.title: {hostelName} Custom Google Map
mapCard.description: Opens directly in your Google Maps app with all our secret layers

guide.emptyCategory: No places found in this category.

atm.desc: Withdraw BAM (KM) at UniCredit or Raiffeisen ATMs on Dalmatinska — about a 2-minute walk from the hostel.

konzum.desc: Nearest Konzum for water, snacks, and basics. Open late on most days except Sunday.

apoteka.desc: Pharmacy on Titova street for medicine, first aid, and travel essentials.

u2.desc: U2 Pizza stays open late — a reliable option if you arrive hungry after reception hours.

zeljo.desc: Легендарные боснийские чевапи на Баščaršija. Лучшая местная кухня, проверенная годами.

mahir.desc: Popular local pizzeria with generous portions and fair prices, a short walk from the city center.

edin.desc: Fresh burek, pastries, and coffee from one of Sarajevo's favourite neighbourhood bakeries.

vucko.desc: Cosy gastro pub with local beer and hearty Balkan plates — great for a relaxed evening.

ribica.desc: Tiny, quirky bar filled with vintage objects. A local favourite for an authentic Sarajevo night out.

kinobosna.desc: Legendary Monday jam sessions and concerts in an old cinema hall. Check the schedule before you go.

fabrika.desc: Third-wave coffee roastery with excellent espresso and a calm workspace vibe.

habitus.desc: Stylish brunch spot with healthy bowls, great coffee, and a terrace when the weather is nice.

yellowfort.desc: Потрясающая панорамная точка. Идеальное место для встречи заката с видом на все Сараево.

exchangeOffice.name: Обмен валюты Exclusive
exchangeOffice.description: Честный курс обмена EUR на BAM (KM) без скрытых комиссий всего в 3 минутах пешком.

supermarket.name: Супермаркет Bingo / Konzum
supermarket.description: Ближайший продуктовый магазин, чтобы купить воду, перекус или личные принадлежности по местным ценам.

yellowBastion.name: Желтый бастион (Žuta Tabija)
yellowBastion.description: Потрясающая панорамная точка. Идеальное место для встречи заката с видом на все Сараево.

day.title: Ring the doorbell
day.banner: The doorbell button is located to the right of the entrance and is labeled with the hostel's name.

night.title: Late Self Check-In (After {time})
night.banner: The reception is closed. Please use the access codes below instead of the doorbell to avoid waking up other guests.

subDoor.title: Basement Entrance
subDoor.guide: Go down the stairs to the left of the main entrance, find the basement door, and enter the code.

preTrip.title: Before Your Trip
preTrip.description: Important information to prepare for your arrival and check-in process.

sundayClosure.title: Sunday Closure
sundayClosure.description: Sunday in Bosnia — a non-working day. Shops, supermarkets and most establishments are closed. Plan your purchases!

luggage.title: Luggage Storage
luggage.description: You can arrive before {time} or leave your bags after check-out. Luggage storage at the reception is completely free!

directions.fromSubtitle: From which location are you arriving?
directions.trustDisclaimer: Маршрут проверен хостелом. Используйте пошаговую инструкцию для остановок и билетов.

labels.ticket: Билет: {kiosk} KM в киоске / {driver} KM у водителя

settlement.title: Welcome Inside!
settlement.description: You have checked in automatically. Please visit the reception in the morning from 08:00 to complete your payment and provide your passport for mandatory tourist registration.

memories.title: Share your memories
memories.subtitle: Upload your favourite hostel photos or videos.

concierge.arrivalGuideButton: How to get to the hostel (Guide)

errors.noFiles: Please select at least one file.
errors.fileTooLarge: One or more files exceed the 100MB limit. Select smaller ones.
errors.uploadFailed: Upload failed. Please check your connection and try again.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

fileZone.prompt: Click to upload photos or videos

success.title: Thank you for sharing!
success.description: Your memories have been successfully uploaded.

hero.title: Balkan Han Hostel
hero.subtitle: Your green oasis in the very heart of Sarajevo

nightAccess.title: Night return access codes
nightAccess.description: If you go out at night, use these codes to get back in. Do not ring the doorbell.

taxi.whatsappMessage: Hello! Please send a taxi to {pickupPoint}. Destination: {address}.

registrationAlert.title: Settle Payment & Passport.
registrationAlert.description: Stop by the reception tomorrow after {time} for mandatory tourist registration and payment.

hostelFeatures.title: Why Travelers Choose Us
hostelFeatures.subtitle: All the essentials and extra comforts designed for the perfect stay in Sarajevo.
